work.cn: 紫罗兰永恒花园 外传 - 永远与自动手记人偶 -
work.title: ヴァイオレット・エヴァーガーデン 外伝 - 永遠と自動手記人形 -

points.name: Festung Hohensalzburg
points.mark: 贵族学校城堡的原型之一

points.name: アヤソフィア博物館
points.mark: 要塞内景

points.name: Cochem - Pinnerkreuz
points.mark: One of the cuts from the beginning of the movie when Violet is traveling to the school (~00:02:28).To get up here, you can either use Cochem ropeway ("Cochemer Sesselbahn", 6,90€ roundtrip) or walk up the hill for aprox. 15-20min.

points.name: Cochem Castle - Inner Gate
points.mark: Inner gate at Cochem castle. In the anime, Amy's room is to the left.There is no room at the castle that looks exactly like her room, but - according to one of the guides - there is one with similar furniture. It is not part of the regular guided tour though.

points.name: Cochem Castle - Outer Gate
points.mark: The Gate matches what is shown in the Animation, but area on the left side is different

points.name: Cochem Castle - 00:03:21
points.mark: View from the bridge connecting the outer bailey with the inner parts of the castle.For some reason the lion statue didn't make it into the finished anime background. ;-)

points.name: Cochem Castle - courtyard
points.mark: Only the building on the left side and the well match up with the courtyard in real life. The little tower behind the well, which is one of the few still existing medieval structures has been replaced with a larger building in the animation.

points.name: Cochem - Staircases
points.mark: On Taylor's first tour with Benedict both of them run down those stairs.The area looks a bit different in real-life though.

points.name: Cochem - Uferstraße
points.mark: view of the castle in real life, sourounding area looks different

points.name: Cochem - Valley View
points.mark: Approximation based on the location of the castle and nearby hills. Might not be be possible to get a 100% matching picture due to vegetation in the area.

points.name: Cochem - Taylors first mail delivery
points.mark: This stop on Taylors first tour is at Obergasse, next to a hotel called "Lohspeicher". The house looks a bit different in real life and is a private home. So please don't put anything in the actual mailboxes there.

points.name: Cochem - Branntweingässchen
points.mark: The last stop of Benedict's and Taylor's tour is only a few steps away from her first mail delivery in real-life.

points.name: Mannheim Baroque Palace (Knights Hall)
points.mark: The Debut dance of Violet and Amy/Isabella is one of my favorite scenes in the movie. Knights Hall is used a the model for the background artwork. A few other backgrounds used for the school, are based on other parts of the palace too.photos/editing by @And3rgraund

points.name: Mannheim Barque Palace (Outside, inner courtyard)
points.mark: photos/editing by @And3rgraund

points.name: Nuremberg - Schildgasse
points.mark: Violet and Taylor walk down this street when they're delivering mail in the "new town" of Leiden

points.name: Nuremberg - Kaiserburg
points.mark: View from the entrance to Kaiserburg

points.name: Nuremberg - Hauptmarkt
points.mark: In the movie we're only getting a short glympse at this place. In real-life it's probably mostly known for hosting"Nuremberg Christkindlesmarkt", a Christmas market held here annually from the end of November until christmas eve. Outside this period it is mainly uses as a market for local produce or as an event space.

points.name: Cochem - Alte Gutsschänke
points.mark: Some elements on the houses have been slightly changed. It's another stop on Taylors and Benedicts mail delivery tour in the second part of the movie.

points.name: Nuremberg - Königsstraße
points.mark: Another cut from Violets and Taylors tour to new town. The buildings on the left exist, but the one on the right is either located somewhere else or completely made up.

points.name: Nuremberg - Königstraße2
points.mark: Unlike most of the cuts using Nuremberg locations in the movie, this one is from Taylors and Benedicts mail delivery tour, not the later one with Violet. The real-life counterpart is located at the intersection of Königstraße and Theatergasse.

points.name: Hatzenport - St. Johannes
points.mark: View along the Mosel river as Violet travels to the school
